_source: player.vimeo.com/video/<id>/config (public, refererless). Real STRUCTURE mirroring the captured config, trimmed to an HLS/DASH-only video: `progressive` is empty (no direct MP4 rendition), so the resolver must fall back to the `hls` cdns block and pick `default_cdn`. The existing player-config.json has a progressive rendition that wins, so its own hls block is never exercised — this fixture covers that fallback against the real cdns shape. exp/hmac tokens are short-lived signed CDN links, replaced with SIG placeholders (the resolver host-pins to vimeocdn.com and returns the URL verbatim).
